title: Message Channels

notifications.qrPrompt:
Please scan the QR code in the popup terminal window to complete login

The interface will update automatically after successful login

telegram.fetchUsersHint: Fetch users who have messaged this bot
telegram.noUsers: No users found. Make sure someone has sent a message to this bot first (e.g. /start).
telegram.placeholderText: Users will be added automatically via pairing flow.
telegram.inheritedFromPrimary: Inherited from primary bot if empty.

allowFrom.title: Allow From (DM User IDs)
allowFrom.description: Only allow messages from these user IDs in DMs

groupAllowFrom.title: Group Allow From (Sender IDs)
groupAllowFrom.description: Only allow messages from these user IDs in groups

plugin.title: Feishu Plugin
plugin.notInstalled: Feishu plugin is required for Feishu channel

telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.helpText: 1. Search @BotFather and send /newbot to get Token  2. Search @userinfobot to get User ID

discord.name: Discord
discord.helpText: Get from Discord Developer Portal, enable Developer Mode to copy Channel ID

slack.name: Slack
slack.helpText: Get from Slack API dashboard, Channel ID can be copied from channel details

feishu.name: Feishu
feishu.helpText: Get credentials from Feishu Open Platform, Chat ID can be found in group settings

imessage.name: iMessage
imessage.helpText: macOS only, requires Messages access permission

whatsapp.name: WhatsApp
whatsapp.helpText: Requires QR code scan to login, run: openclaw channels login --channel whatsapp

empty.title: No Channel Selected
empty.description: Select a channel from the list to configure

confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear the configuration for this channel?
